summary: Recording source unknown with only modest audio quality; the second set is noted as pretty good.
review: Both reviewers point out that this show was part of the summer‑'86 tour where the Dead alternated opening duties and even opened for Bob Dylan on this night.  One fan calls the second set "pretty good" despite missing much of the first set, but no specifics about performance or sound are given.

ai_rating.rationale: Very limited commentary; only a mild positive note on the second set and no details on recording quality, leading to an average rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type; cannot assess beyond a basic assumption of average quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as "pretty good" while the first set was largely missed by one reviewer; no further detail on pacing or transitions.
